name: thinkneo-mcp-smb-products
description: 8 standalone MCP servers for SMBs — Guardrails (prompt injection, PII, secrets detection), FinOps (AI cost tracking and budgets), Observability (agent tracing), Smart Router (17+ models, 9 providers), Trust Score (governance scoring 0-100), Memory (persistent agent memory), ThinkSecure (runtime security + SOC2/GDPR audit), and A2A Lite (agent-to-agent protocol). 37 tools total, TNC credits billing, streamable-http transport.
